title: Aurora, 33938, Palm Pals Sprinkles Cake Slice 5In, Soft Toy, White
features: Let's meet the Palm Pals Sprinkles Cake Slice Soft Toy, 5in, from Aurora's popular Palm Pals Collection. This charming brown and white cake slice plush is filled with beans and fits perfectly into your palm, making it great for small cuddling and a wonderful gift for any occasion!

The Sprinkles Cake Slice is part of the Palm Pals Craving collection. The Palm Pals range includes collections such as Craving, Pets, Critters, Zoo, Aquatic, and many more. These plushies are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute.

Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. They are part of our Eco-Friendly initiative, featuring inner fibre fill and beans made from recycled plastic. Our hangtags are recyclable, and our cloth labels are made from recycled materials.

Suitable from birth, the Palm Pals Sprinkles Cake Slice measures 13cm. No party is complete without cake. Sprinkles Cake Slice embodies the cheery spirit of celebrations and sweet moments every slice of cake brings. With a personality as vibrant as her colourful sprinkles, she brings joy and laughter wherever she goes. Everyone cheers when Sprinkles arrives because she represents the peak of the party, the cake!

As an industry leader for over 40 years, Aurora World is committed to designing and manufacturing innovative and high-quality plush products, and this charming soft toy is no exception. Get your hands on this delightful plush and experience the joy of this beloved Palm Pals.

These soft toys are all super gorgeous and irresistibly cute. Palm Pals are cute, touchable soft toys made with high-quality materials. Safety Warning Suitable from Birth
